content.en:
"Okay, I promise to cooperate!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu nodded in agreement.

He did know some of the inheritances, but his strength was already difficult to improve, and he couldn't gain anything else, so those inheritances were useless to him.

And Ye Tian is different, the strength of the one-star god general is enough to obtain better inheritance and treasures, even if a small part of the treasures are given to him, it is enough to increase his strength a lot.

Therefore, it is beneficial for him to cooperate with both sides.

"Wanfa Supreme, I want to know what the strength of the one-star god general is, I wonder if I can ask one or two?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu looked forward to it.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Please!"

Yuan Gu Zhi took the initiative, he knew that he was not Ye Tian's opponent, if he let Ye Tian make the first move, he might not even have a chance to make a move.

"Tian Yuan Divine Palm!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu slammed into the palm, this palm was the strongest move he had created over the years, almost close to the ultimate attack power of the first-class supreme.

And at this time, Ye Tian also made a move.

With just one stroke of sword qi, it instantly shattered the Heavenly Yuan Divine Palm of the Lord of the Yuan Gu, and the sword qi was not yet annihilated, and continued to slash towards the Lord of the Yuan Gu.

Burst!!!

The Lord of the Yuan Gu was shaken away, spitting blood from his mouth.

"The gap is so big!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu was shocked.

He was sure that this was definitely not Ye Tian's strongest move, if Ye Tian made a full move, he would be killed in seconds.

"Is this the strength of a one-star god general?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu was both shocked and full of anticipation.

Ye Tiandao: "Lord of the Yuan Gu, my strength is infinitely close to the peak of the one-star god level, far beyond the first-star god general. "

Ye Tian said this, and he didn't want to hit the Lord of Yuangu.

"The Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws doesn't need to be comforted, I won't be unable to accept the facts!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said with a smile.

"That's good!" Ye Tian smiled.

"Wanfa Supreme, let's talk about cooperation first, I have received a lot of inheritances, but some inheritances have no treasures, only some inheritances, but no amount of inheritance can improve my strength, and there are only a few inheritances that are really useful to us. In my opinion, the inheritance place where you can get a lot of treasures is the inheritance of the Ten Thousand Desolation Dan Tower, the inheritance of the Qilin Hall and the inheritance of the source land, and the inheritance of the Ten Thousand Desolation Dan Pagoda should not be suitable for the Ten Thousand Law Supreme, it assesses the alchemy ability, and it has nothing to do with strength. And the inheritance of the Qilin Hall and the inheritance of the source are the real places of great opportunity, pay attention to the strength, with the strength of the Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws, you should be able to gain a lot. "

The main road of the Yuangu.

Then, the Lord of the Yuan Gu carefully informed Ye Tian of the Qilin Hall Inheritance and the Source Land Inheritance.

The inheritance of the Qilin Hall is a place of inheritance that tests combat effectiveness, there are layers of world inside, every time you enter a world, you will be affected by a lot of fierce beasts containing the blood of the Qilin, these fierce beasts are cultivated by the Qilin Palace, the combat effectiveness is very strong, the weak are only the dominant realm, but the powerful is comparable to the first-class supreme, the lord of the ancient times has only broken through the third world, and failed in the fourth world, so the fourth world has a number of first-class supreme combat power of fierce beasts.

And the fourth world is not the last world, and further up may need to face a fierce beast with god-level combat power.

Each world has a lot of resources, which are put by the Qilin Palace, if you break into the fifth world, you will definitely get a lot of resources, and after the end of the level, you will also get a batch of treasures and inheritance.

Therefore, the place of inheritance of the Qilin Hall is definitely a good place.

And the source is even more magical, the source is a special world, similar to a small world, the physical body cannot enter, only with consciousness into it.

What's even more strange is that the source land completely shields the rules of the universe, and formulates rules that only belong to the source land, if you enter the source land, you can't use any talents, supernatural powers and mastery anymore, you can only learn the rules of the source and the martial arts that can adapt to the source land.

There will be some source people in the source land, defeat the source people, learn the martial arts of the source people, and the strength will increase step by step, and the more source people you defeat, the more benefits you will get in the end.

"Let's go to the Qilin Hall first!"

Ye Tian decided.

Subsequently, Ye Tian signed a contract with the Lord of the Yuangu, and the Lord of the Yuangu took Ye Tian to the Qilin Hall for inheritance.

"Ten Thousand Law Supreme, the master of the Qilin Hall is Qilin Allah, the specific realm is not clear, but the Qilin Hall instrument spirit said that once you break through the fifth layer, you can become a named disciple of Qilin Allah, if you break through the sixth layer, you are a formal disciple, if you break through the seventh layer, it is a personal disciple. Unfortunately, I can't break through the fifth layer, otherwise with the help of Qilin Allah, I may be able to transcend!" said the Lord of Yuangu with emotion.

"Do you accept apprentices just based on strength?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Obviously, this so-called Qilin Allah is not too strong in the chaos, otherwise it will not only look at strength, maybe the other party only wants to accept a disciple who can transcend.

Because if you can break through the world above the fifth layer, then the strength will be sure to be detached, and the potential of those who can transcend is naturally not bad, as for how high it is, Allah Qilin does not care.

And the great existence in the Chaos God Realm is different, focusing on potential, if the potential is not enough, even if he has the four- or five-star combat power of the god general, he will not be able to become a formal disciple.

It didn't take long.

Ye Tian and the Lord of the Yuan Gu came to a void, which was empty, but it was the destination of the two.

"This is it!" "The Lord of the Yuan Gu said: "That inheritance land is here, I have broken through once before, and the second time I go in, I will directly enter the fourth world, I am not strong enough, so I won't go in!"

"Please also ask the Lord of the Yuan Gu to break through the space and locate it, otherwise I won't be able to find that place of inheritance!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Good!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu nodded.

If he didn't locate it, Ye Tian would indeed not be able to find it.

But in fact, this inheritance place will only appear once in a long time, and the requirements for entering it are very high, and you can't enter unless you are powerful and supreme.

If there is no one to guide you, then you can only wait for the Qilin Hall Inheritance Land to take the initiative to appear.

But he knew the location of the inheritance of the Qilin Palace, so he could naturally locate it easily.

"Broken!"

The Lord of the Protogens tore through the void and directly reached a certain dimensional dimension.

Rumble!!!

A supreme aura permeated out, and Ye Tian saw a magnificent temple through the layers of space.

"Qilin Palace!"

Ye Tian didn't dare to delay time, escaped into it, and entered the Qilin Hall in an instant.

When Ye Tian entered, the Lord of the Yuan Gu muttered: "I hope that the Ten Thousand Law Supreme will obtain some more treasures, so that I can hope to step into the battle power of the god general, otherwise the strength is not enough, let alone detachment, it is not easy to survive!"
